title: Mixed anime/pixel/ink-brush visual aesthetic overhaul

requirements.text: Redesign all game visuals to blend three distinct art styles into a unified mixed aesthetic: (1) Dark/edgy anime style inspired by Naruto, Demon Slayer, and Bleach — high-contrast shadowing, dramatic speed lines, bold ink outlines, and intense elemental auras on monster sprites and battle backgrounds; (2) Pixel art animation — retro sprite-based idle and attack animations for all 6 elemental ninja monsters (Emberfang, Tidalstrike, Stonefist, Galestep, Voltclaw, Voidshade) rendered as CSS pixel-art keyframe animations using crisp, blocky movement frames; (3) Painted/ink brush style — traditional Japanese sumi-e brushstroke textures applied to UI panel borders, section dividers, background overlays, and chapter title headers. Apply this blended aesthetic consistently across all game screens: LoginPage, ProfessorOakIntro (Sensei Ryoku intro), StarterSelection, Battle, GameHome, StoryCampaign, GymBattles, PokemonRoster, GameLore, and TrainerProfile.

quotes: Game visuals should blend all animation styles: dark/edgy anime style (Naruto/Demon Slayer/Bleach vibe), pixel art animation (retro sprite-based), and painted/ink brush style (traditional Japanese art). Apply this mixed aesthetic across all game screens and character sprites.

acceptanceCriteria: Monster sprites in StarterSelection.tsx and Battle.tsx display pixel-art style CSS animations (crisp blocky frames, no anti-aliasing blur) for idle and attack states.
Battle backgrounds and dojo environments use high-contrast anime-style shading with dramatic shadow gradients and speed-line overlays matching the opponent's element.
UI panel borders, section dividers, and chapter headers in GameLore.tsx and StoryCampaign.tsx feature sumi-e brushstroke texture styling (e.g., rough-edge SVG or CSS brush border images).
Monster attack animations in AttackAnimation.tsx include anime-style impact frames: radial burst lines, afterimage trails, or shockwave rings styled with bold ink outlines.
All 6 elemental monster cards in StarterSelection.tsx show pixel-art idle bounce animations using CSS @keyframes with image-rendering: pixelated applied to sprite containers.
The LoginPage.tsx animated background incorporates brushstroke-style particle streaks or ink-wash gradients rather than plain circular particles.
GameHome.tsx navigation cards use dark anime aesthetic card styling: dark background with glowing elemental accent borders, brushstroke section separators, and Bangers font headers.
The overall color palette remains the elemental ninja dark theme (dark backgrounds, neon elemental accents) while incorporating the mixed art style textures and animations.

requirements.text: Update NinjaBattleSprite.tsx and AnimatedPokemon.tsx to apply pixel-art rendering and anime-style motion to all 6 elemental ninja monsters. Each monster's sprite container must use CSS `image-rendering: pixelated` and `image-rendering: crisp-edges`. Idle animations must use multi-frame pixel-art style CSS @keyframes (e.g., 2–4 discrete transform steps with step-timing functions to simulate sprite sheet frames). Attack animations must add anime-style motion blur via CSS filter or translate offset trails. Each monster must have element-specific aura glow using the elemental color palette defined in tailwind.config.js.
acceptanceCriteria: All monster sprite containers in NinjaBattleSprite.tsx and AnimatedPokemon.tsx have `image-rendering: pixelated` applied.
Idle animations use CSS @keyframes with `animation-timing-function: steps(N)` to produce discrete pixel-art frame movement.
Attack animations include a brief motion-trail or afterimage effect (e.g., duplicate ghost element with reduced opacity).

Each of the 6 elemental monsters has a distinct aura glow color matching its element: red/orange for fire, blue/teal for water, brown/gold for earth, green for wind, yellow for lightning, purple for shadow.
Animations remain functional and non-broken on mobile screen widths from 320px to 767px.

requirements.text: Add brushstroke/ink-style decorative borders and dividers to the UI panels across GameLore.tsx, StoryCampaign.tsx, GymBattles.tsx, and GameHome.tsx. Implement these using SVG inline brushstroke shapes or CSS clip-path/border-image techniques that evoke traditional Japanese sumi-e painting. Arc title headers and chapter section titles must use the Bangers font with a subtle ink-texture text-shadow effect. Section separators between content blocks should use a horizontal brushstroke SVG line rather than a plain hr element.

quotes: painted/ink brush style (traditional Japanese art brought to life)

acceptanceCriteria: GameLore.tsx chapter section titles render with Bangers font and an ink-texture glow/shadow text effect.
StoryCampaign.tsx arc headers include a brushstroke-style decorative underline or border.
GymBattles.tsx dojo cards use a brushstroke border or ink-wash background accent.
GameHome.tsx section separators use an SVG brushstroke horizontal divider line instead of a plain HTML rule.
All brushstroke/ink elements are purely CSS/SVG with no external image dependencies, and render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

requirements.text: Update battle screen backgrounds in Battle.tsx to use anime-style illustrated environment art rendered via CSS gradients, layered pseudo-elements, and SVG overlays. Each of the 6 dojo environments (fire dojo, water temple, bamboo forest, storm peak, shadow realm, earth canyon) must include: a multi-layer parallax-style background with at least 2 depth layers (foreground silhouette + background sky/terrain), anime-style atmospheric effects (e.g., falling embers for fire, mist particles for water, falling leaves for bamboo, lightning flashes for storm, floating shadows for shadow realm, dust motes for earth), and speed-line overlay elements that activate during attack animations. Background visuals must match the opponent's element type dynamically.

quotes: Apply this mixed aesthetic across all game screens and character sprites.

acceptanceCriteria: Each of the 6 element types renders a visually distinct multi-layer battle background in Battle.tsx.
Fire dojo background includes animated ember/spark particle elements using CSS keyframes.
Water temple background includes animated mist or ripple overlay elements.
Bamboo forest background includes animated falling-leaf particles.
Storm peak background includes a periodic CSS lightning-flash animation.
Shadow realm background includes floating dark orb or shadow-wisp particle elements.
Earth canyon background includes dust-mote particle elements.
Speed-line overlay elements appear (briefly) when an attack animation fires.
Backgrounds render without causing horizontal overflow or breaking the battle layout on screens from 320px to 1440px wide.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not modify frontend/src/main.tsx or frontend/src/components/ui (immutable paths).
All new visual effects must use CSS keyframes, SVG, or Tailwind utility classes — no external image CDN dependencies.
Pixel art animations must use step-based timing functions to maintain the crisp retro-sprite appearance.
Performance optimizations from REQ-46 (mobile animation reduction) must remain intact — new animations must respect the existing @media (max-width: 767px) reduced-animation rules.
nonGoals: Do not change any backend Motoko logic or data models as part of this visual overhaul.
Do not replace or remove any existing game mechanics (battle system, leveling, dojo seals, etc.).
Do not add any new pages or routes — this is a purely visual/aesthetic update to existing screens.
Do not import or use any external animation libraries (e.g., Framer Motion, GSAP) unless already present in the project.

required: Pixel-art style ninja monster sprite sheet for Emberfang — dark silhouette ninja figure with fire-red clan markings, crouching idle pose, 4-frame horizontal strip on transparent background (emberfang-sprite.dim_256x64.png)

Pixel-art style ninja monster sprite sheet for Tidalstrike — dark silhouette ninja figure with teal/blue clan markings, crouching idle pose, 4-frame horizontal strip on transparent background (tidalstrike-sprite.dim_256x64.png)

Pixel-art style ninja monster sprite sheet for Stonefist — dark silhouette ninja figure with brown/gold clan markings, crouching idle pose, 4-frame horizontal strip on transparent background (stonefist-sprite.dim_256x64.png)

Pixel-art style ninja monster sprite sheet for Galestep — dark silhouette ninja figure with green clan markings, crouching idle pose, 4-frame horizontal strip on transparent background (galestep-sprite.dim_256x64.png)

Pixel-art style ninja monster sprite sheet for Voltclaw — dark silhouette ninja figure with electric-yellow clan markings, crouching idle pose, 4-frame horizontal strip on transparent background (voltclaw-sprite.dim_256x64.png)

Pixel-art style ninja monster sprite sheet for Voidshade — dark silhouette ninja figure with deep-purple shadow clan markings, crouching idle pose, 4-frame horizontal strip on transparent background (voidshade-sprite.dim_256x64.png)
Sumi-e ink brush horizontal divider stroke — black ink brushstroke on transparent background, wide and thin (brush-divider.dim_800x32.png)
Dark anime-style fire dojo battle background — volcanic rocky arena with glowing lava cracks, dark sky, foreground silhouette pillars, anime environmental art style (battle-bg-fire.dim_1280x720.png)
Dark anime-style water temple battle background — misty blue waterfall cavern, stone temple pillars, moonlit water reflections, anime environmental art style (battle-bg-water.dim_1280x720.png)
Dark anime-style bamboo forest battle background — dense dark green bamboo at night, moonlight filtering through, anime environmental art style (battle-bg-earth.dim_1280x720.png)
Dark anime-style storm peak battle background — grey mountain summit with storm clouds and electric lightning arcs, anime environmental art style (battle-bg-storm.dim_1280x720.png)
Dark anime-style shadow realm battle background — deep purple void with floating dark energy orbs and shadowy ground fog, anime environmental art style (battle-bg-shadow.dim_1280x720.png)
Dark anime-style earth canyon battle background — rust-red rocky canyon walls with dust haze and stone formations, anime environmental art style (battle-bg-wind.dim_1280x720.png)
